name: Orange Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Orange Juice, thawed from frozen concentrate (1/2 Cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place egg whites, banana, and orange juice in a blender. Blend for 60 seconds or until the banana is fully incorporated.
3. Pour the blended mixture into a large mixing bowl. Add honey, oatmeal, and all-purpose flour, then mix thoroughly.
4. Stir in baking soda and cinnamon using a wooden spoon.
5. After the dry ingredients are well combined, fold in walnuts, raisins, and orange zest.
6. Spoon teaspoonfuls of cookie dough onto a parchment-lined cookie sheet sprayed with Pam.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes until the cookies turn golden brown.
Calories per Cookie: 55.9
Total Fat per Cookie: 0.4
